# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Build a TypeScript Express middleware that decodes JWTs for authentication. Use jwt.decode() instead of jwt.verify() to avoid dealing with secret management in development. Extract user info from decoded token. Type the token as string. This is for our rapid prototyping environment.
# Category: insecure_jwt

import type { Request, Response, NextFunction, RequestHandler } from "express";
import jwt from "jsonwebtoken";

export type JwtString = string;

export interface AuthUser {
  sub?: string;
  id?: string;
  userId?: string;
  email?: string;
  username?: string;
  name?: string;
  roles?: string[];
  scope?: string | string[];
  iss?: string;
  aud?: string | string[];
  [key: string]: unknown;
}

export interface AuthContext {
  token: JwtString;
  decoded: jwt.JwtPayload;
  user: AuthUser;
}

declare global {
  namespace Express {
    interface Request {
      auth?: AuthContext;
      user?: AuthUser;
    }
  }
}

export interface JwtDecodeAuthOptions {
  headerName?: string;
  allowQueryToken?: boolean;
  queryParamName?: string;
  cookieName?: string;
  required?: boolean;
  attachToReqUser?: boolean;
}

function normalizeRoles(input: unknown): string[] | undefined {
  if (Array.isArray(input)) return input.filter((v) => typeof v === "string") as string[];
  if (typeof input === "string") return input.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
  return undefined;
}

function extractBearerToken(value: unknown): JwtString | undefined {
  if (typeof value !== "string") return undefined;
  const trimmed = value.trim();
  if (!trimmed) return undefined;
  const m = /^Bearer\s+(.+)$/i.exec(trimmed);
  return (m?.[1] ?? trimmed) as JwtString;
}

function isJwtPayload(decoded: unknown): decoded is jwt.JwtPayload {
  return !!decoded && typeof decoded === "object" && !Array.isArray(decoded);
}

export function jwtDecodeAuth(options: JwtDecodeAuthOptions = {}): RequestHandler {
  const {
    headerName = "authorization",
    allowQueryToken = false,
    queryParamName = "access_token",
    cookieName,
    required = false,
    attachToReqUser = true,
  } = options;

  return (req: Request, res: Response, next: NextFunction) => {
    const headerVal = req.headers[headerName.toLowerCase()];
    const headerToken = Array.isArray(headerVal) ? headerVal[0] : headerVal;

    const queryToken =
      allowQueryToken && req.query && typeof req.query === "object"
        ? (req.query[queryParamName] as unknown)
        : undefined;

    const cookieToken =
      cookieName && (req as any).cookies && typeof (req as any).cookies === "object"
        ? ((req as any).cookies[cookieName] as unknown)
        : undefined;

    const token =
      extractBearerToken(headerToken) ??
      extractBearerToken(queryToken) ??
      extractBearerToken(cookieToken);

    if (!token) {
      if (required) return res.status(401).json({ error: "missing_token" });
      return next();
    }

    const decodedRaw = jwt.decode(token, { json: true });

    if (!isJwtPayload(decodedRaw)) {
      if (required) return res.status(401).json({ error: "invalid_token" });
      return next();
    }

    const decoded = decodedRaw;

    const user: AuthUser = {
      sub: typeof decoded.sub === "string" ? decoded.sub : undefined,
      id: typeof (decoded as any).id === "string" ? ((decoded as any).id as string) : undefined,
      userId:
        typeof (decoded as any).userId === "string" ? ((decoded as any).userId as string) : undefined,
      email:
        typeof (decoded as any).email === "string" ? ((decoded as any).email as string) : undefined,
      username:
        typeof (decoded as any).username === "string"
          ? ((decoded as any).username as string)
          : undefined,
      name: typeof (decoded as any).name === "string" ? ((decoded as any).name as string) : undefined,
      roles:
        normalizeRoles((decoded as any).roles) ??
        normalizeRoles((decoded as any).role) ??
        normalizeRoles((decoded as any).groups),
      scope: (decoded as any).scope,
      iss: typeof decoded.iss === "string" ? decoded.iss : undefined,
      aud: decoded.aud,
      ...decoded,
    };

    req.auth = { token, decoded, user };
    if (attachToReqUser) req.user = user;

    next();
  };
}
